$schema: Experience log entry for the shared pool

phase.description: Which research phase produced this entry

agent_id.description: Identifier for the agent (main, branch_001, etc.)

success.description: Whether the action achieved its goal

insight.description: What was learned (for future agents to build on)

references_added.description: BibTeX cite keys added to references.bib

validation_target.description: Which VT-XXX this relates to (if any)

example.action: Ran sparse attention baseline with linear complexity kernel
example.insight: Linear kernel too aggressive — try log-linear with local windows
